Standalone notebook

Example: Exploratory data analysis

# Autoreload
%reload_ext autoreload
%autoreload 2

# Generic init code
from new_dir.myinit import *
from new_dir.dataset import *
from new_dir.plots import *

# Optional checks
print(sys.executable)
my_sineplot();

# Specific library for summarizing dataframe
from summarytools import dfSummary

Exploratory Data Analysis
